description: Direct call-to-action encouraging followers to download and use a mobile app for ordering, leveraging swipe-up mechanics and product desire.
structural_recipe: Lead with an emotional trigger or hunger cue (e.g., 'لا تقاوم الجوع'). Use a gesture instruction (e.g., 'اسحب الشاشة') that guides users through a specific interaction. Follow with direct app promotion ('اطلب من التطبيق 📲'). Include relevant hashtags for discoverability. Structure: Emotion → Gesture Instruction → App CTA → Hashtags.
why_it_works: Saudi users respond to convenience-focused CTAs that reduce friction in purchasing. The swipe gesture makes the action tangible and interactive. Pairing hunger/desire emotions with app installation taps into immediate gratification, a key driver in F&B engagement. Arabic messaging creates cultural resonance and trust.
transplantation_caveats: Requires active app promotion infrastructure; ineffective without app installed base.
Swipe-up mechanics may not function equally across all Instagram formats and account types.
High competition in F&B category may dilute CTA effectiveness if pattern becomes oversaturated.
Works best with established restaurant brands; unfamiliar brands may see lower conversion.
